_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular profiling of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors associated with neurofibromatosis type 1, based on large-scale real-time RT-PCR.

_contextSnippet: Sixteen (59.3%) of the 27 genes were significantly upregulated in the 9 MPNSTs (P < 0.05)...Twelve (92.3%) of the 13 genes were significantly down-regulated in the 9 MPNSTs (P < 0.05)
details: Successfully identified 16 significantly upregulated genes (P < 0.05) and 12 significantly down-regulated genes (P < 0.05) in MPNSTs compared to plexiform neurofibromas
